name: Biryani
description: A rich and aromatic rice dish cooked with basmati rice, tender chicken or beef, and a blend of spices like saffron, cardamom, and cloves. Often served with boiled eggs and salad.

name: Sushi
description: A traditional Japanese dish made with vinegared rice, fresh seafood, and vegetables. It comes in many forms like rolls, nigiri, and sashimi, often served with soy sauce and wasabi.

name: Bibimbap
description: A colorful Korean rice bowl topped with assorted vegetables, marinated beef or seafood, a fried egg, and spicy gochujang sauce. Everything is mixed together before eating.

name: Chinese Take Out
description: A variety of popular Chinese dishes like fried rice, noodles, orange chicken, and beef with broccoli, typically served in convenient takeaway boxes full of bold flavors.
